about.title: About Me
about.heading: Jonko: Homebrew Developer, ROM Hacker, and YouTuber
about.bio1: I'm Jonko — a ROM hacker, homebrew developer, and YouTuber. My primary work is with the <haroohieLink>Haroohie Translation Club</haroohieLink>, where I serve as project lead and main ROM hacker, producing fan translations of Japanese games.
about.bio2: You may also know me from my <youtubeLink>YouTube channel</youtubeLink> or my <blogLink>blogs</blogLink> where I explain how ROM hacking works. I also have an upcoming (secret) homebrew game I'm developing with a talented team.
